conversations.say: Inez, our disclosure boundary is set. We protect tenant anonymity while acknowledging the camera interval without inventing a murder narrative.
conversations.offer: Full alignment on building access facts and joint defense of resident privacy.
conversations.request: Fulfill our commitment to coordinate the exact terms of our public and private statements.

conversations.say: Morgan, here is the bounded operational truth of the service exit and audit context, provided under your promise of resident anonymity and precise attribution.
conversations.offer: Exact operational account of the service route and camera audit gap.
conversations.request: Ensure our agreed attribution boundaries are strictly respected in your final report.

public_statement: Management likes simple stories, but buildings have gaps because equipment fails and people improvise. Do not mistake a camera interval or an automated access change for a murder plot.

commitments.promise: Coordinate disclosure of the camera interval to protect resident anonymity.

goal_progress: Fulfilled disclosure coordination with Inez to protect vulnerable residents.
Provided a bounded operational account to Morgan under strict attribution terms.
Maintained the vital distinction between physical access gaps and automated system events.
reasoning_summary: Dee concludes her role by successfully protecting tenant privacy with Inez, delivering a precise, bounded operational account to Morgan, and casting her final ballot based on observable infrastructure gaps and voluntary movement patterns rather than manufactured panic.
